data.content: Implementation review rejected. 1. src/rollback.rs still calls profile.require_state(&knot.state) before computing the rollback target, but gate states such as evaluating are not part of profile-defined states, so gate rollback still fails before the new queue-state helper matters. 2. rollback_target still recognizes only planning, implementation, and shipment as non-review action states; evaluating is still excluded, so it has no rollback target back to ready_to_evaluate. 3. The added regression test only checks is_queue_state('ready_to_evaluate') and does not exercise resolve_rollback_state or a rollback of an evaluating gate, so the actual failure path remains untested.
